case_title: LISA-MARIE STUBBERT VS. DAVID JAMES PEERMAN

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF STUBBERT, LISA-MARIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
